Minimum Viable Funnel for Lead Gen
The Framework
MINIMUM VIABLE FUNNEL
There are four main funnels we'll use with Lead Gen clients - however, we usually
always try and start with Funnel #1, which is a minimum viable funnel (shortest funnel
available). In this video, I talk you through why and what that is.
You can access funnel templates
here: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/18tviYj4OffjLwdlpIfyPVB7EALNhKzao?
usp=sharing
DON'T FORGET! There are full instructions on how to map this out inside the SOP!
